MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Lynn Hambolu Appellant/Defendant.
Bandele Hambolu Appellant/Defendant.
Ibukun Hambolu Appellant/Defendant.
Viktoriya Friis Respondent/Plaintiff.
Steven Friis Respondent/Plaintiff.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Steven Friis, Respondent/Plaintiff, testifies on his own behalf.
Lynn Hambolu, Appellant/Defendant, testifies on her own behalf.

The Court reviews all previously submitted exhibits from small claims.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Dept 610, Judge Harold Kahn, Clerk Ron Ross, Not Reported
